programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital, this symbol of the city's segregated past has been packed with dynamite and is ready to be demolished. No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building. Now, three desperate parties want the money - a blue collared ex-fighter (Adkins) who finds it while working as part of the demolition crew, a prison guard (Lundgren) willing to do anything to pay for his daughter's cancer treatment and a ruthless gang who claim to be the rightful owners. The demolition charges are set, everyone clears out and the Castle is set to fall in 90 minutes. The clock is ticking. Who will find the cash and: will they get out alive?

programme.desc: A man finds himself developing a new perspective on life once he finds out it's almost over. Benjamin Kasparian is a paleontologist of Armenian descent who has just split up with his wife Amanda. While trying to readjust to single life, Benjamin visits the doctor and is informed he's suffering from an unusual brain disease called Talbot's Syndrome, and he's not likely to live longer than five weeks. Benjamin is initially philosophical about his fate and decides to enjoy himself as much as he can in the time he has left - much to the disgust of Amanda, his best friend, his boss, and his new girlfriend, all of whom believe he should be taking the matter more seriously.

programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports including Jet Sprinting, Aquabike Racing and F1 H2O Powerboats. This episode features Round 2 of the Australian V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships from Temora in New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "California's Wild Coast"

programme.title: Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Journey to the rugged heart of the Montana Rockies. This cinematic exploration captures the monumental scale of Glacier’s ancient, ice-carved valleys and its iconic, turquoise alpine lakes. Watch the first light of dawn hit the jagged peaks of the Garden Wall and follow the mist as it drifts over the cedar forests of Lake McDonald. A breathtaking tribute to one of America’s most pristine and powerful wilderness sanctuaries.

programme.title: Journey Through Alaska
programme.desc: Venture into the untamed heart of the north. This cinematic exploration takes you through deep-blue glaciers, towering granite peaks, and the vast, silent tundra where nature still reigns supreme. Experience the raw majesty of the Alaskan wilderness, from its rugged coastlines and crashing waves to the quiet, snow-draped landscapes that define the edge of the continent.

programme.title: Locked On HBCU
programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Driven
programme.desc:
GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN takes you deep inside the world of Supercross and Motocross champion James Stewart. Ride alongside the man known as the fastest on two wheels as he shares the highs, lows, and relentless drive that shaped his legendary career.
GoPro Original Series DRIVEN also follows X Games star and snowmobile icon Chris Burandt. Join him on a thrilling journey to discover what fuels his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. This is raw, high-octane storytelling you can’t miss.

programme.title: S1E2 Driven
programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: S1E3 Driven
programme.desc: Three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano continues to push the limits on the track while finding new ways to use his racing platform to make a positive impact on others. In this episode of GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN, step into the world of DC Shoes co-founder, rally car driver, and marketing mastermind Ken Block. Strap in for an electrifying journey through the moments and passions that have fueled his remarkable career.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

See how his racing career changed after a spinal cord injury at Vegas to Reno 15 years ago.

programme.desc: Brittany Murphy is a single mother of two in Savannah, GA. Since leaving the military, she has sought peace, calm, and a purpose. Brittany knows that it can be found in nature; she just isn’t sure where to start - lucky for her, Kinga does.

programme.title: The Spark: Blind CrossFit Champion
programme.desc: Erica Powell will not be slowed down. After cancer treatments as an infant left her legally blind, she is fueled to become a world-class athlete and a beacon of inspiration to others.

programme.title: Restaurant on the Radar: Street Food
programme.desc: Travel around the world without leaving the City Beautiful behind! Brendan samples street food from all over the globe: Laotian delicacies, a fresh spin on falafel, and so much more.

programme.title: Maddy & Dixie Take Sactown: Create & Innovate
programme.desc: Maddy & Dixie seek out Sacramento locals who are trend setting and pushing the limits in the original & inventive ways they do business.

programme.title: Plate It!: Best Buds Become Culinary Competitors in Small Town Toss-Up
programme.desc: Long time chef friends Kisha Washington and Brian Hohl compete in this Smaltimore small plates challenge. Can these small town friends handle a big screen competition?
